ordinanceLabel: Moraga Municipal Code · Municode · Title 15 (Buildings and Construction) · Adopted 2022 CBSC eff. Jan 1 2023
fireAgency: Moraga-Orinda Fire District (MOFD) · 1280 Moraga Way, Moraga CA 94546 · Plan check appointment required with Fire Marshal · (925) 258-4599 · mofd.org
utility: PG&E (gas and electric distribution) · MCE (Marin Clean Energy) community choice aggregator · Solar NEM/NEM+ through PG&E grid · No local all-electric mandate
